body.title: Fix datacenter_logs anomalies: librarian flat file + mystery device dirs
body.result: fixed librarian log path to curation/curation.jsonl; _json_file_sink skips unbound records; deleted debris dirs d/ _minimaldevice/ unknown/
body.description:
2026-05-30 alignment check found two anomalies in datacenter_logs/:

1. librarian uses a flat file: datacenter_logs/librarian/curation.jsonl — no subsystem level. Rule requires datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/. Source: unseen_university/devices/librarian/tools/curation_tools.py:26.

2. Three mystery device directories: d/ (single-char, test debris from 2026-05-23), _minimaldevice/ (test scaffold), unknown/ (fallback name — a device ran with no DEVICE_ID set). These are not real production devices.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/librarian/tools/curation_tools.py, possibly devices with missing DEVICE_ID
**Scope boundary:** IN — fix librarian log path to use subsystem dir, identify what device produced unknown/ and fix its DEVICE_ID, delete debris dirs (d/, _minimaldevice/, unknown/); OUT — do not change log content format
**Test plan:** After fix, datacenter_logs/ contains only production device dirs with proper subsystem hierarchy
**Completion criteria:** librarian writes to datacenter_logs/librarian/curation/curation.jsonl or similar subsystem path; debris dirs removed
